title: Coach
greeting: Hi! Tell me what would help you train well this week — feeling fresher, fitting life around the plan, adding a little confidence, or handling a niggle — and I'll suggest a safe adjustment. You'll always see the change before anything is applied.

examples.fresh: Help me feel fresh for this weekend
examples.extraDay: I have an extra day to train
examples.moveLongRun: Move my long run to Sunday

detailNotice.text: To answer some questions, the coach may read detailed data from your recent runs, including heart rate. Your GPS location is never shared with it.

sessionGreeting: Let's talk about your {{type}} run on {{date}} ({{km}} km). What's on your mind — too hard, wrong day, or something else? I'll suggest a safe adjustment and you'll see it before anything changes.

sessionExamples.tooHard: This feels too hard for where I am
sessionExamples.wrongDay: I can't make it that day
sessionExamples.easier: Can we swap it for something easier?

fallback.noValidAdjustment: I couldn't find an adjustment that keeps your plan within the app's training rules — nothing was changed.
fallback.noChangeNeeded: Nothing in the plan needs to change for that.
fallback.applied: Done — your plan is updated. Anything else?

errors.noProposedPlan: Coach response did not include a proposed plan.
errors.noProposalReady: No coach proposal is ready to apply.
errors.confirmNoPlan: Coach confirmation did not include a plan.
errors.revalidateFailed: The proposal no longer validates — nothing was applied.

server.RATE_LIMIT: You've reached today's coach limit — try again tomorrow.
server.NO_PLAN: There's no training plan to adjust yet — build one first.
server.COACH_UNAVAILABLE: The coach is unavailable right now — try again in a moment.
server.TRAJECTORY_NOT_FOUND: This coach conversation is no longer available.
server.TRAJECTORY_CLOSED: This coach conversation is already closed.
server.NO_OPEN_PROPOSAL: There's no open proposal to apply.
server.PROPOSAL_INVALID: The proposal no longer validates — nothing was applied.

transport.timeout: The coach took too long to start up — try again in a moment.
transport.offline: Couldn't reach the coach — check your connection and try again.
transport.reauth: Your session expired — sign in again.
transport.unavailable: The coach is unavailable right now — try again in a moment.

toast.feedbackFailed: Couldn't send feedback — try again in a moment
toast.historyLoadFailed: Couldn't open that conversation — try again.

history.title: Conversations
history.empty: No coach conversations yet. Ask about your plan and they'll show up here.
history.readOnly: This conversation is closed — you can read it but not reply.
history.planChanged: Your plan has changed since this was suggested. Start a new conversation to adjust your current plan.

usage.ringAria: Coach usage: {{used}} of {{limit}} daily requests used
usage.limitReached: You've used today's coach requests. Your allowance resets tomorrow.

detail.title: Coach usage
detail.freeActions: Applying changes, browsing history, and flagging answers don't count.

memory.prompt: Remember this for future coach chats?

flag.placeholder: What did the coach get wrong?

footer: Your coach uses your message, plan, recent runs, and saved memory to answer. See our <1>privacy policy</1> and <3>safety note</3>.

input.placeholder: e.g. help me feel fresh for this weekend
